free_text:
FILER NOTES

1. This amendment is being filed to update the amount of income reported for certain partnerships, pursuant to the 2024 Instruction Guide, Financial Disclosure Reports for Calendar Year 2023 and Periodic Transaction Reports. The note quotes the guidance that if a K-1 form is not received before the filing deadline, it is acceptable to provide a good faith estimate based on prior-year income, and once the K-1 is received the filer must amend the FD Report if the category of value of the good faith estimate differs from actual income received.

uncertainties.note: Audit repair: normalized nonstandard page_type 'filer_notes' to schema value 'other'.
